cause_analysis.narrative: Jersey Stylz Barber & Beauty churned on 2026-04-18 after 126 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2026-02-12. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 61 times, but the client only replied 13. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via phone_call, client wrote: "Hello. Hi, Andre. Hi, how are you doing? Great. Great to know. It's been a long time since you've called. I mean, I'm so…" — no outbound response in 21 days.
